ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Potatoes 63%, High Oleic Sunflower Oil 30%, British Ham and Dijon Mustard Flavour Seasoning 7% (Rice Flour, Sugar, Salt, Dried Onion, Dried Dijon Mustard, Dried Yeast, Dried Bay, Natural Flavouring (contains Mustard), Acid (Citric Acid), Dried Clove, Rosemary Extract, British Cooked Ham Extract).
product_name: British Ham & Dijon Mustard Hand Cooked Potato Crisps
